core_principles: Precision over Decoration: Every pixel must serve the data.
The 'Clock' is God: Time remaining is the most critical metric.
Industrial Aesthetics: Monospace fonts for IDs, sharp edges, functional colors.
anti_patterns: No rounded 'pill' buttons (use sharp or slightly rounded 'industrial' buttons).
No hidden data behind clicks (show as much as possible).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide transition-all shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-[1px] active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-accent hover:text-white h-10 px-6 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm p-6 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: h-11 bg-white border-2 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-sm font-mono text-sm

textures: Use subtle 'noise' or 'grain' overlays on dark backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
Use 'scanline' effects on empty states or loading screens.

images.description: Cargo ship loaded with colorful containers at a busy port.
Harbor cranes silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky.

assets.icons: lucide-react (Use: Ship, Anchor, Container, Clock, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, FileText, Settings, User)

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio > 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons + text labels).
Interactive elements must have visible focus states.
Support keyboard navigation for all tables and forms.

general: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure mobile responsiveness (stack grids on small screens).
component_reuse: Wrap Shadcn components to apply custom 'Tactical' styling.
